REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC., AIRBNB PAYMENTS, LLC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO MEET ITS BURDEN DEMONSTRATING THE EXISTENCE OF AN ARBITRATION AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT BOUND BY THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT BETWEEN DECEDENT AND DEFENDANT. (MONSCHKE V. TIMBER RIDGE ASSISTED LIVING (2016) 244 CAL.APP.4TH 583.) PLAINTIFF'S UNAUTHORIZED SUR-REPLY IS STRICKEN AND WAS NOT CONSIDERED BY THE COURT. [PROPOSED] ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; REPORTED. (D501)

Off Calendar Mar-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS AIRBNB, INC., and AIRBNB PAYMENTS, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants' First Set Of Requests For Admission To Plaintiff.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' motion to compel further responses to requests 9-12 in their first set of requests for admissions is denied. Plaintiff's responses comply with the intent and spirit of CCP 2033.220 and are not evasive. Although plaintiff does not use the statutorily required phrase that "a reasonable inquiry concerning the matter in the .. request has been made," her amended responses show that she believes that she has made a reasonable inquiry and nothing substantive would be achieved by requiring her to amend her responses to include the quoted language. That defendants clearly (and likely in good faith) believe that their requests should be admitted does not warrant compelling plaintiff to provide further responses. Defendants' remedy is to seek cost of proof sanctions in the event that they are able to prove the truth of their requests.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to Dept. 301 a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HEK)

DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC., AIRBNB PAYMENTS, LLC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS is DENIED.
